evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Conduct data validation and feasibility studies for customer-defined business challenges
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Data validation and quantitative evaluation language leans rigour, with no explicit fast-paced/velocity phrases present despite the startup context.
evidence.domain_risk: operational optimization in the aviation company through the development and provision of strategic network solutions
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Aviation operational optimization affects customer business decisions but the JD carries no financial reporting, regulatory, or safety-compliance language.
evidence.data_team_maturity: NABLA Mobility Inc. is a startup driving operational optimization in the aviation company
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The company is explicitly described as a startup with no named data sub-teams or established data infrastructure mentioned.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design, build, and automate data analysis pipelines using AWS CDK (TypeScript preferred)
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific infrastructure tooling (AWS CDK, TypeScript) and customer-defined business challenge framing give a concrete picture of the role.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Communicate analytical findings and provide recommendations to the BizDev team
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role centres on customer-facing business challenges and the BizDev team, a commercial orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Design, build, and automate data analysis pipelines using AWS CDK (TypeScript preferred)
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Designing and building pipelines is ownership-leaning, but much of the role is framed as communicating findings and preparing materials for others, giving mixed autonomy.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The company builds AI/ML-powered network solutions, but no AI skill or responsibility is expected of the candidate in this analytics engineering role.
evidence.testing_framing: Conduct data validation and feasibility studies for customer-defined business challenges
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data validation is named as an owned responsibility with an explicit action verb ("conduct"), not merely a tool in a skills list.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed entirely in delivery and analytical capability terms with no risk or compliance register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design, build, and automate data analysis pipelines using AWS CDK (TypeScript preferred)
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: At an early-stage startup, the dominant framing is designing and building new pipelines and systems from scratch.
